steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette.
Type #text:'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the VS Code Command Palette input.
Press Enter to confirm the selection of "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" in the VS Code command palette dropdown.
Type "Debug in Copilot (Chrome)" into the VS Code run/debug configuration dropdown at the top center of the application window.
Press Enter to select "Debug in Copilot (Chrome)" from the configuration dropdown in the Visual Studio Code debug panel.
Click on the "Password" text field within the Microsoft account login page to focus and enable input.
Type  ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}} into the password input field on the Microsoft login page to authenticate user  ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}
Press the "Enter" key to submit the password field in the Microsoft login page.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the "Stay signed in?" prompt by selecting the highlighted "Yes" button on the Microsoft login page in a browser.
Use keyboard shortcut "Ctrl+-" to zoom out on the "Chat | M365 Copilot" page in a web browser.
@assertion ${{var:app_name}}local displayed on the main section of the screen.
